title: Running gel buffer (10X)
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"7v71j","text":"For use in Polyacrylamide Gel System For Electrophoresis Of Proteins.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":11,"length":57}],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"FE60233E9BE14DCF9E6B076D681D5700","url":"https://www.protocols.io/view/Polyacrylamide-Gel-System-For-Electrophoresis-Of-P-ep7bdrn"}}}}
steps: Combine 45.5 gm of Tris base and 216.0 gm of Glycine.
Adjust the final volume to 1500 mL. The pH should be approximately 8.3 without adjustment.
SDS and 2-mercaptopropionic acid are added to the buffer prior to electrophoresis: the SDS to 0.1% and 1 mL of mercaptopropionic acid to 1 liter of 1X running buffer.
creator: Irina Agarkova
